hero.title: Packers & Movers in Andhra Pradesh
hero.subtitle: Visakhapatnam to Vijayawada, Guntur to Tirupati — 5,411+ verified movers across 20 cities in AP.

intro:
Andhra Pradesh's long coastline, Krishna-Godavari delta and booming port economy make it one of South India's key relocation markets. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 5,411+ verified movers across Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Guntur, Tirupati, Rajahmundry, Kakinada, Eluru, Kadapa and 12 more cities.

From Vizag's naval and port establishments to Vijayawada's trade hubs and Tirupati's pilgrimage city logistics, our KYC-verified vendors offer reliable, fully insured relocation services across AP's diverse regions.
whyUs: Andhra Pradesh's coastal geography, cyclone-season considerations and the Amaravati capital region's rapid development call for experienced movers. Our AP vendors use weather-resistant packing, know local route alternatives during monsoons, and carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage on every move.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within AP cities start at ₹3,500. Vijayawada to Visakhapatnam 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹8,000–₹14,000 including full packing.

faqs.q: Which cities in Andhra Pradesh does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover 20 cities including Visakhapatnam, Vijayawada, Guntur, Tirupati, Rajahmundry, Kakinada, Eluru, Kadapa, Nellore, Anantapur, Kurnool, Ongole, Chittoor and more.

faqs.q: Do you handle moves during Andhra's cyclone-prone monsoon season?
faqs.a: Yes. We monitor weather alerts and use waterproof packing for all coastal AP moves. Moves are rescheduled proactively if a cyclone alert is issued for the route.

faqs.q: Can you move between Andhra Pradesh and Telangana or Tamil Nadu?
faqs.a: Yes. AP–Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam–Chennai and other cross-state routes are fully covered with GPS tracking, transit insurance and door-to-door delivery.
